title: Full Stack Web Development
description: Master modern web technologies from frontend to backend with industry experts.
details:
Join our comprehensive Full Stack Web Development internship program. You will work on real-world projects and learn the latest trends in the MERN stack.

  • Hands-on projects
  • Mentorship from seniors
  • Certification on completion

title: Artificial Intelligence & ML
description: Explore the future with AI and Machine Learning. Build smart models from scratch.
details: Deep dive into the world of AI. This program covers everything from basic data manipulation to advanced machine learning algorithms.

title: Android App Development
description: Create stunning mobile applications using React Native and Flutter frameworks.
details: Our mobile app development program focuses on cross-platform development, allowing you to build apps for both Android and iOS with a single codebase.
